problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
